title: Design & Code: Offload the Heavy Lifting with Web Workers

location.name: Crews Center for Entrepreneurship, 2nd Floor - University of Memphis

summary: Learn practical techniques to enhance web performance using JavaScript Web Workers. Join Coriano Harris for an interactive, hands-on workshop featuring a live demo building a Web Worker from scratch, a step-by-step browser-based walkthrough (no installation required), and real-world exercises to practice offloading intensive tasks.

description.whoIsThisFor: This event is for UI/UX designers, software engineers, and aspiring developers interested in building more responsive and performant web applications. Whether you're curious about closing the gap between design intent and high-performance code, this workshop is for you.

agenda.details: Grab some food, say hello, and get to know others in the room.

Offload the Heavy Lifting with Web Workers

A live coding session exploring practical techniques to build more responsive and performant web applications using JavaScript Web Workers.

Key topics include:
• Live demo: Building a Web Worker from scratch
• Interactive, step-by-step walkthrough in your browser via CodePen.io (no account or installation required)
• Practical tips to bridge the gap between design intent and high-performance code
• Real-world exercises to practice offloading intensive tasks to Web Workers

Bring a laptop — it's highly recommended to follow along!
Share what you built, ask questions, and connect with fellow attendees. We'll also give shoutouts for upcoming events and snap a group photo before we close out the evening.

speakers.name: Coriano Harris
speakers.talkTitle: Offload the Heavy Lifting with Web Workers

rsvp.details: Please confirm your attendance via the Meetup app so we can plan accordingly.
